focus: 4 successive 90° rotations on a 3x3 grid (points at -2,0,2) to exercise 4-cycle merging and rotational symmetry detection.
Projection to the real axis on a 4x4 grid (non-integer step) to stress snapping behavior and deduplication when imaginary parts collapse to nearest grid rows.
Mixed sequence with an invalid code leading the list, then conjugation, negation, and a rotation on a 6x6 grid to test ignoring invalid codes and nontrivial multi-step invariant clusters.
